overall.description: A cinematic drive through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The vehicle travels through covered highways with red neon lighting, stops at a busy intersection with the Pondsmith sign, and continues through wet streets reflecting colorful advertisements. Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with red neon ceiling lights

agents.ego_description: driving steadily through the covered highway underpass with red neon lighting overhead

entered.detail: concrete and metal overpass structure with red neon light strips along the ceiling
large illuminated advertisement screens mounted on the ceiling of the underpass
rain-soaked road surface reflecting the red and blue neon lights
tall building with large RC logo signage visible at the start of the clip

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through a covered highway underpass bathed in red neon light. Digital billboards line the ceiling above the wet, reflective asphalt road. The enclosed space creates a tunnel-like atmosphere with cyberpunk aesthetics.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban street approaching major intersection

events.description: exits covered highway underpass into open city street with tall buildings

agents.ego_description: driving through open streets approaching a major intersection with the Pondsmith sign visible ahead

entered.detail: skyscraper with distinctive vertical neon ring lighting
large red rectangular sign with white Pondsmith text marking the intersection
ground floor commercial spaces with neon signage and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered highway, the scene opens into a wide urban street lined with towering buildings. The distinctive Pondsmith sign becomes visible ahead, marking a major intersection. The wet roads continue to reflect the myriad of neon signs and building lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with pedestrian crossing and commercial signage

events.description: vehicle stops at intersection to wait for pedestrians crossing the street
vehicle turns right at the intersection, passing under the Pondsmith sign

agents.ego_description: stopped at the intersection waiting for pedestrians to cross, then turning right onto a new street

notable_agents.action: crossing the street in front of the stopped vehicle

entered.detail: yellow striped crosswalk markings on the wet asphalt
building signage for El Coyote Cojo visible on the right side of the intersection
dark entrance to another covered roadway or tunnel structure

segments.scene_description: The vehicle stops at the Pondsmith intersection as pedestrians cross the yellow-striped crosswalk. After waiting, it turns right beneath the large red Pondsmith sign, passing the El Coyote Cojo building. The scene transitions from the open intersection into a darker underpass area.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with circular commercial plaza and rotating billboards

events.description: emerges from underpass into street with circular building and different architecture
vehicle stops behind another car at the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: driving through neon-lit streets toward a large circular building with rotating billboards, then stopping at the intersection

notable_agents.action: black car stopped ahead at the traffic light

entered.detail: large cylindrical building with multiple levels of rotating digital billboards
steam rising from street-level vents on the left sidewalk
pink neon sign reading 'wide open' on the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: Driving through the city streets, the vehicle approaches a distinctive circular plaza building covered in rotating digital billboards. Steam rises from sidewalk vents as the vehicle continues toward an intersection, eventually stopping behind another car waiting at the light. The neon-lit environment maintains the cyberpunk atmosphere throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from a claustrophobic, red-lit highway tunnel into the sprawling, neon-drenched expanse of a cyberpunk city center. It begins within a covered underpass where digital billboards line the ceiling and red neon light reflects off the wet asphalt. As the vehicle exits the tunnel, the space opens into a wide urban street of towering skyscrapers, leading toward a major intersection dominated by a glowing Pondsmith sign. The camera then pauses at a yellow-striped crosswalk before turning right past the El Coyote Cojo building and dipping back into a darker underpass. Finally, the scene emerges into the city streets, passing a circular plaza building draped in rotating digital billboards and rising steam before coming to a halt behind another vehicle at a traffic light.
